programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood, Pt 2
programme.desc: Mantan anggota Pasukan Khusus Green Beret melakukan misi pengintaian untuk membebaskan orang hilang dari penjara Viet Cong.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow

programme.title: The Chinese Widow

programme.desc: An action filled account of an Ex FBI negotiator who uses all his skills to save a jumbo jet headed for Los Angeles California from the terrorists who have placed a bomb on board.

programme.title: Final Approach, Pt 1
programme.desc: Kisah penuh aksi tentang seorang mantan negosiator FBI yang menggunakan semua keahliannya untuk menyelamatkan pesawat jumbo yang menuju Los Angeles, California dari para teroris yang telah menempatkan bom di dalamnya.

programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Bencana terjadi di sebuah terowongan di New York ketika ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan berusaha membantu orang-orang di dalam menemukan jalan keluar menuju tempat aman.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Darren McCord, seorang petugas pemadam kebakaran di Pittsburgh Civic Arena, mendapati dirinya berpacu dengan waktu untuk menyelamatkan putrinya, Wakil Presiden, dan stadion yang penuh sesak, saat teroris mengambil alih pertandingan Piala Stanley NHL.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 1
programme.desc: Ketika strain baru yang mematikan dari virus yang tidak dikenal menginfeksi Los Angeles, CDC dan pihak lain harus memerangi infeksi tersebut, sambil juga melawan ekstremis, penjahat, oportunis politik, dan penganut teori konspirasi.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 2
programme.desc: Ketika strain baru yang mematikan dari virus tak dikenal menginfeksi Los Angeles, Dr. Kayla Martin dari CDC dan timnya harus melawan walikota yang keras kepala, para oportunis politik, dan waktu yang terus berjalan untuk menghentikan infeksi dan menyelamatkan dunia dari "Pandemi."

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: Seorang aktor superhero yang kariernya telah merosot mencoba menghidupkan kembali kariernya yang memudar dengan menulis, menyutradarai, dan membintangi sebuah produksi Broadway.

programme.desc: Phileas Fogg adalah seorang penemu yang yakin bahwa ia dapat berkeliling dunia dalam waktu 80 hari dengan didampingi oleh pelayannya yang setia, Passepartout, dan seorang pemandu jalan nan cantik bernama Monique.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr. (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Setelah kecelakaan mobil di Mulholland Drive membuat seorang wanita amnesia, dia dan seorang calon bintang Hollywood mencari petunjuk dan jawaban di seluruh Los Angeles dalam usaha berliku yang melampaui mimpi dan kenyataan.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Rambo 3 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Rambo yang penyendiri meninggalkan biara Buddha untuk membebaskan mentornya dari Pasukan Khusus (Green Beret) yang berada di bawah kendali Soviet di Afghanistan.

programme.title: Final Approach Part 1
programme.desc: An action filled account of an Ex FBI negotiator who uses all his skills to save a jumbo jet headed for Los Angeles California from the terrorists who have placed a bomb on board.

programme.title: Final Approach, Pt 1
programme.desc: Kisah penuh aksi tentang seorang mantan negosiator FBI yang menggunakan semua keahliannya untuk menyelamatkan pesawat jumbo yang menuju Los Angeles, California dari para teroris yang telah menempatkan bom di dalamnya.

programme.title: Final Approach Part 2
programme.desc: An action filled account of an Ex FBI negotiator who uses all his skills to save a jumbo jet headed for Los Angeles California from the terrorists who have placed a bomb on board.

programme.title: Final Approach, Pt 2
programme.desc: Kisah penuh aksi tentang seorang mantan negosiator FBI yang menggunakan semua keahliannya untuk menyelamatkan pesawat jumbo yang menuju Los Angeles, California dari para teroris yang telah menempatkan bom di dalamnya.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1941, setelah membom Tokyo, seorang pilot AS melakukan pendaratan darurat di Tiongkok. Seorang janda setempat menyelamatkannya dan mempertaruhkan segalanya untuk menyembunyikannya dari pasukan Jepang.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire's annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Bencana di terowongan New York saat ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan mencoba membantu orang-orang di dalamnya menemukan jalan keluar.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For The Universe
programme.desc: In 2210, a crew dispatched to rescue humans from a vampire attack discovers that the vampires are plotting a take-over…and getting help from a surprising source.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For The...
programme.desc: Sekelompok manusia bertempur melawan berbagai spesies vampir alien di wilayah terpencil luar angkasa. Buffy bertemu Star Trek di dunia ala Mad Max.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 1
programme.desc: Ketika strain baru yang mematikan dari virus yang tidak dikenal menginfeksi Los Angeles, CDC dan pihak lain harus memerangi infeksi tersebut, sambil juga melawan ekstremis, penjahat, oportunis politik, dan penganut teori konspirasi.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 2

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Birdman

In the hectic months leading up to Christmas in London, eight very different couples and their love lives intersect.
Eight odd couples and their love lives become intertwined just before Christmas in London.
Eight London couples face their relationships in different ways. They test how far love can take them.

programme.title: Trolls
trolls
Trolls
Trolls
trolls
programme.desc: A duo of shock-headed Trolls venture outside the boundaries of their kingdom on a quest to save their village from destruction by the large creatures who devour Trolls to make them feel happy.
Two trolls with strange hair venture beyond the limits of their kingdom. They are trying to save their village from giant creatures who delight in eating trolls.
Two 'trolls' embark on a journey beyond the borders of their kingdom to save their village from destruction from giant creatures that hunt and eat the 'trolls'.
Two trolls leave the kingdom to save the village from pleasure-seeking, troll-eating monsters.

programme.title: Wild Wild
Liar Liar
Liar Liar
Liar Liar
programme.desc: Fletcher Reede is a successful defence lawyer who has greatly benefitted from the habit of lying. His life takes an ugly turn when his son wishes for him to become incapable of lying for a day.
Fletcher Reed is a successful lawyer who has profited greatly from lying. His life is thrown into turmoil when his son makes a wish that his father tell the truth for a day.
Fletcher Reed is a lawyer who became successful because of his habit of lying. His son's desire to make it impossible for him to lie for a whole day makes his life worse.
A defense lawyer's world is turned upside down when his son makes a wish that his father speak only the truth.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
What to Expect When You're Expecting
What to Expect When You're Expecting
What to Expect When You're Expecting
What to Expect When Your Expecting
programme.desc: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.
Five Atlanta couples are ready to face the joys and sorrows of becoming parents for the first time. However, they soon realize that becoming parents requires more dedication than they expected.
5 couples dealing with the joys and sorrows of having a first child find the duty of parenthood overwhelming.
Five couples, enjoying the joy of having a baby for the first time, realize that parenthood is difficult.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
America's Sweethearts
America's Sweethearts
America's Sweethearts
America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.
Kiki, a female megastar's shy personal assistant, falls in love with her estranged husband when she helps the couple make one last public appearance before divorce.
A female megastar is helped by her assistant, who loves her husband, to help her appear in public as a couple before her divorce.
Kiki, an actress's assistant, falls in love with her husband in order to help the couple make one last appearance before their divorce.

programme.title: The Lake House
The Lake House
The Lake House
The Lake House
The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.
Dr. Kate exchanges letters with Alex, who is bored with life. They have no idea that both of them are actually living in two different time periods.
Doctor Kate and architect Alex, who fall in love through letters, unknowingly lead their lives two years apart.
Dr. Kate and architect Alex fall in love through letters, living two years apart.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pemain hoki yang gagal menggunakan keahliannya di lapangan golf untuk menyelamatkan rumah neneknya.

programme.title: The Hulk
programme.desc: Ilmuwan Bruce Banner berubah menjadi monster hijau raksasa yang tak terkendali akibat kecelakaan radiasi gamma saat emosinya memuncak.

programme.title: The Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Seorang perawat terjebak dalam misteri gaib Hoodoo saat bekerja di rumah tua terpencil milik pasangan lansia di Louisiana.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Kembali ke Downton Abbey saat keluarga Crawley yang tercinta dan staf mereka yang pemberani bersiap untuk kunjungan kerajaan dari Raja dan Ratu Inggris dalam pengalaman sinematik yang megah ini.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pemain hoki yang gagal menggunakan keahliannya di lapangan golf untuk menyelamatkan rumah neneknya.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: Seorang wanita mendapatkan kemampuan otak super manusiawi setelah zat kimia sintetis bocor ke dalam aliran darah di tubuhnya.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Kelinci Paskah yang ingin menjadi drummer kabur ke Hollywood dan bertemu seorang pengangguran yang membantunya mengejar impian musiknya.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: Seorang polisi menyamar masuk ke dunia balap liar Los Angeles untuk menangkap geng pembajak truk yang dipimpin oleh Dominic Toretto.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: Brian O'Conner menyamar untuk menjatuhkan gembong narkoba di Miami lewat aksi balap jalanan penuh adrenalin demi membersihkan nama baiknya.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Lima murid SMA dari kasta sosial yang berbeda dihukum bersama di ruang detensi pada hari Sabtu. Lewat interaksi intens, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka punya lebih banyak kesamaan dari dugaan.

programme.title: Happy Death Day 2U
programme.desc: Ketika pembunuh bertopeng di kampus secara misterius kembali untuk meneror target baru, Tree kembali melalui lingkaran waktu yang penuh dengan kengerian dan ketegangan yang cerdas dalam HAPPY DEATH DAY 2U.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: Seorang polisi menyamar masuk ke dunia balap liar Los Angeles untuk menangkap geng pembajak truk yang dipimpin oleh Dominic Toretto.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: Seorang polisi menyamar masuk ke dunia balap liar Los Angeles untuk menangkap geng pembajak truk yang dipimpin oleh Dominic Toretto.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Chapter 1: Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak, sang istri hantu, kembali untuk membalas dendam atas seorang wanita hamil yang mengalami pelecehan seksual dan kehilangan bayinya. Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Terperangkap di sebuah rumah yang ditinggalkan, seorang pria tanpa nama mati-matian mencari petunjuk tentang bagaimana dia bisa sampai di sana. Jawabannya tersembunyi dalam serangkaian video viral yang mengganggu, yang masing-masing mulai menginfeksi pikirannya.

programme.title: Sinister, Ep 1
programme.desc: Serial antologi tentang makhluk jahat yang bersembunyi dalam bayang-bayang dunia kita dan tidak menginginkan apa pun selain melakukan hal-hal yang jahat.

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: Sebuah pasangan muda dibawa ke sebuah pondok di tengah hutan untuk menjalani konseling setelah putri mereka menghilang, dan mereka berjuang untuk membedakan mana yang nyata dan mana yang hanya khayalan dalam proses pemulihan mental mereka.

programme.title: 3AM, Ep 1
programme.desc: Seorang pegawai baru mengusik keberadaan hantu-hantu di kantornya pada hari pertama bekerja. Ia pun segera merenungkan perbuatannya usai mengalami sejumlah peristiwa nan menyeramkan saat bertugas di malam hari.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: They Wait In The Dark
programme.desc: Amy, seorang wanita muda, tengah melarikan diri bersama putranya, Adrian, dari mantan pacarnya yang kasar. Ketika masa lalu menghantui mereka, mereka harus menghadapi kekuatan yang mengancam mereka, baik dari dalam maupun luar.

programme.title: Once Again
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan keluarga yang berlatar belakang Keluarga Song, yang tak pernah memiliki hari yang tenang.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Seorang siswi SMA bertemu kembali dengan neneknya secara dramatis setelah hilang selama 12 tahun.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration

programme.title: Dr. Cheon & The Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon merupakan seorang pengusir setan palsu yang tak bisa melihat atau mendengar hantu. Namun suatu hari, seorang wanita mendatangi Dr. Cheon dan memintanya untuk menyelamatkan adik perempuannya yang kerasukan.

programme.title: Once We Were Us
programme.desc: Dua mantan kekasih bertemu kembali dalam penerbangan ke Korea, yang membangkitkan kenangan akan pertemuan tak terduga mereka pada tahun 2008, ketika mereka menemukan cinta di tengah hiruk-pikuk Seoul sebelum kehidupan memisahkan mereka.

programme.title: Rolling
programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: Train To Busan
programme.desc: Saat virus-zombie melanda Korea Selatan, para penumpang termasuk seorang ayah dan putrinya, pasangan saumi istri, dan beberapa siswa berjuang untuk bertahan hidup dalam kereta api dari Seoul ke Busan.

programme.title: Train To Busan
programme.desc: Saat virus-zombie melanda Korea Selatan, para penumpang termasuk seorang ayah dan putrinya, pasangan saumi istri, dan beberapa siswa berjuang untuk bertahan hidup dalam kereta api dari Seoul ke Busan.

programme.title: Streaming
programme.desc: Mengikuti seorang streamer misteri dengan jumlah pelanggan terbanyak, yang menyiarkan proses mengungkap petunjuk kasus pembunuhan berantai yang belum terpecahkan secara langsung.

programme.title: My Worst Neighbor
programme.desc: Di sebuah rumah yang tidak kedap suara, seorang pria dan wanita yang tinggal bersebelahan memulai perang suara. Mereka menjalani kehidupan yang hanya dibatasi dinding tipis hingga saling jatuh cinta.

programme.title: Dr. Cheon & The Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon merupakan seorang pengusir setan palsu yang tak bisa melihat atau mendengar hantu. Namun suatu hari, seorang wanita mendatangi Dr. Cheon dan memintanya untuk menyelamatkan adik perempuannya yang kerasukan.

programme.title: Ditto (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah suara gema dari masa depan yang terpancar melalui sebuah radio antik menghubungkan dua orang yang hidup dalam periode waktu yang berbeda, dan mengubah hidup seorang Kim Yong selamanya.

programme.title: I, The Executioner (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Detektif pemula Park Sun Woo dan Seo Do-Cheol, seorang veteran dari tim Divisi Penyelidikan Kejahatan Kekerasan, mengejar seorang pembunuh berantai yang mengguncang dunia mereka.

programme.title: Don't Go Too Far
programme.desc: Saat berdebat tentang pembagian warisan ayah mereka, seorang kakak laki-laki tertua menerima panggilan telepon yang menyatakan bahwa putranya telah diculik.

programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Dua ekor beruang dari sebuah Institut Teknologi berubah menjadi manusia setelah memakan bawang putih dan mugwort. Kini, salah satu dari mereka telah tumbuh menjadi polisi, sementara yang lain menjadi seorang gangster.

programme.title: I Don't Fire Myself
programme.desc: Mendapatkan diskriminasi karena dirinya adalah seorang wanita, Jeong-eun diganggu dan ditekan agar ia segera mengundurkan diri, tapi ia tidak mau menyerah begitu saja.

programme.title: Peninsula
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Peninsula
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Honey Sweet
programme.desc: Chi-ho adalah seorang perancang produk nan sukses, sementara Il-young bekerja di suatu perusahaan pinjaman. Mereka bertemu saat Chi-ho mencoba membayar hutang kakaknya. Kebetulan membuat mereka menjadi dekat.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.title: Boss
programme.desc: Menampilkan anggota geng yang terlibat dalam persaingan sengit untuk mencapai impian mereka sendiri dalam kehidupan sehari-hari.

programme.title: Unforgettable (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Orang-orang mengenang kisah cinta pertama mereka sambil mendengarkan kisah cinta di radio. Selama siaran langsung, seorang DJ radio menerima surat yang berisi kisah-kisah dari sebuah desa nelayan 23 tahun yang lalu.

programme.title: Deadman (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang disebut-sebut sebagai 'tokoh boneka', yang menghasilkan uang dari namanya, hidup sebagai 'orang mati' setelah dituduh melakukan penggelapan dana sebesar 100 miliar won.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Sebuah film aksi okultisme di mana sebuah tim yang terdiri dari beberapa orang melawan roh jahat.

programme.title: Rolling (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Juri, seorang gadis muda berusia 25 tahun, berhenti bersosialisasi dan hanya tinggal di rumah. Ibunya, Young-shim, berjuang melewati masa sulit, masih menjalankan restoran Kim-bob miliknya. Suatu hari, Young-shim pergi untuk merawat ibunya yang sakit, dan Juri mengambil alih restoran secara tak terduga.

programme.title: Thalapathy Is The G.O.A.T.
programme.desc: Pada tahun 2008, di Kenya, Satuan Khusus Anti-Terorisme (SATS), yang terdiri dari M. S. Gandhi dan rekan-rekannya Sunil Thiagarajan, Kalyan Sundaram, serta Ajay Govindharaj, menangkap teroris bernama Omar untuk merebut uranium darinya. Mantan pemimpin mereka, Rajiv Menon, yang buron setelah didakwa melakukan pengkhianatan, juga berada di kereta yang sama. Mereka berhasil mengambil uranium dari Menon dan menghancurkan kereta yang ditumpanginya, dengan keyakinan bahwa semua orang di dalam kereta, termasuk Menon, telah tewas.

programme.title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: On the occasion of Skoda's 125th anniversary, we look back at the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. Also: our practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3, the first purely electric car from VW. And: the McLaren 720S Spider, the super sports car is now also available as a convertible. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: New entry-level bikes from Triumph and BMW
programme.desc: Hardly anyone represents the myth of the Triumph motorcycle brand like Steve McQueen. The actor and racing driver would certainly be excited today about the brand new entry-level Street Twin model, with which the traditional British brand wants to assert itself against increasing competition in nostalgic motorcycles. The 900 cc model from Thai production combines classic design with the latest technology. Our driving report shows how the new Triumph Street Twin, the entry-level model in the Bonneville series, performs during test drives in Valencia. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. What motivates the scrap dealer? What stories can the gas station attendant tell? (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Dülmen near Münster – this is where one of the most spectacular German sports cars is handcrafted: the Wiesmann. It arose from an obsession of the car-crazy brothers Friedhelm and Martin Wiesmann, who managed to build their own sports car company with passion and persistence. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. The VW 181, called the ''Kübel'', was presented in 1969 as one of the most bizarre cars ever built: open, spacious, solid, cheap and four-door. Designed for the Bundeswehr, it initially found hardly any civilian buyers. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Good and conservative, American and avant-garde - in the 60s and 70s, Ford built one classic after another and always according to the Ford formula: simple technology, pleasant shape, affordable price. Taunus, bathtub, escort and Capri, today they are all cult. Car History shows the Ford classics. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Today it's about bestsellers and long-running favorites: Seat's best-selling model is celebrating its birthday: the Ibiza turns 40! To mark the milestone anniversary, the manufacturer is releasing a special model. We test it and take a look back at the successes of this small car. And the big comparison: Mitsubishi ASX competes against its sister models Nissan Juke and Renault Captur. Who is ahead? (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Mercedes Simplex is the ancestor of the Mercedes models. It was built from 1902 to 1906. Wilhelm Maybach once developed the Simplex as a successor to the Mercedes 35 HP. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: In Dubai, the legendary Supercars police fleet hunts down speeders and illegal parkers. And at MTM and Alpina they get more power from the Audis and BMWs. The Audi S8 MTM Talladega R starts with a whopping 802 hp. And the Stuck brothers Johannes and Ferdinand drive the Alpina D5 over the track and delight us with happy flying stunts. We can only hope that the police don't notice. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The second season of the unique report series “Stunt Heroes” also offers endless action. Breathtaking car stunts, spectacular motorcycle crashes, daring body stunts. The stuntmen from Action Concept are leaders in their field across Europe. Stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski looks back at the stunts from the last twelve shows and explains why a stunt sometimes works better in a test than on a film set. The show summarizes all the stunts of the second season and shows how creatively cars are destroyed, motorcycles destroyed and film stunts are implemented - garnished with the best outtakes! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Narkus Neser take part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, one of the funniest winter rallies in Germany (channel info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What has long been known in motorsport is also finding its way more and more into road vehicles: lightweight construction. Carbon is often the keyword here. The small series manufacturer Roding from the Upper Palatinate produces a sports car that, despite a relatively low output of 320 hp, even outshines the Porsche GT3 with a power-to-weight ratio of 2.98 kilos per hp. Several super-light sports cars come from England: Lotus, Caterham and Radical know how to really slim down. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2026
King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: After more than 70 years, Land Rover presents a new edition of the classic Defender off-road vehicle. Also: the world record attempt in drifting in the Porsche Taycan at the Hockenheimring. And: the Porsche 911 Turbo and the 718 Spyder in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. The VW 181, called the ''Kübel'', was presented in 1969 as one of the most bizarre cars ever built: open, spacious, solid, cheap and four-door. Designed for the Bundeswehr, it initially found hardly any civilian buyers. (Station info).

And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.desc: Good and conservative, American and avant-garde - in the 60s and 70s, Ford built one classic after another and always according to the Ford formula: simple technology, pleasant shape, affordable price. Taunus, bathtub, escort and Capri, today they are all cult. Car History shows the Ford classics. (Station info).

To mark the milestone anniversary, the manufacturer is releasing a special model. We test it and take a look back at the successes of this small car. And the big comparison: Mitsubishi ASX competes against its sister models Nissan Juke and Renault Captur. Who is ahead? (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Spring awakening at Motorcycles: We track down the most important current motorcycle trends at one of the many bike trade fairs, the IMOT in Munich. Large travel enduros, maxi scooters and practical bikes are very trendy, as are the latest versions of super athletes. We are also testing the brand new maxi scooters from BMW for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Emotion paired with journalistically independent, critical competence: the magazine is current and diverse. Emotional entertainment, serious and critical information as well as service with useful value are the concept of the show.Challenge Bibendum. Shanghai, Olympics of alternative drive concepts. Today: Traveling in Croatia with the Jeep Wrangler. Pre-war racing cars, touring cars and Formula 1 pilots. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: At the start of the TT 2025, we take a look at the first qualifying sessions and look forward to Lee Johnston as co-commentator (channel info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The traditional brands Jaguar and Land Rover are experiencing a huge upheaval under the umbrella of the Indian Tata Group. Jaguar is rejuvenating itself significantly, Land Rover is expanding with more and more new models. MOTORVISION TV shows how the tightrope walk between tradition and innovation is successful and what role the label “Made in England” plays in this. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: An electrifying future begins. It took a while for e-mobility to gain momentum, but now the manufacturers are stepping on the gas! With the Kia E-Niro and the Hyundai Ioniq we are testing how well Nice and Hamburg are prepared for electromobility. Also: The aCar from the Technical University of Munich is intended to bring electric drives to emerging countries. And at a competitive price of 10,000 euros. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: BMW M5, Mercedes-AMG E63, Audi RS6 or Mulsanne Speed, power sedans offer a unique combination of style, performance and everyday usability. They combine the luxury of a limousine with the dynamics of a super sports car. Dream Cars presents the fastest and most exciting power sedans in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Opel record racing car, called the 'Black Widow'. Built as an unofficial secret project, the limousine converted from an honest man to an arsonist caused a sensation on the race track in the late 1960s. Well-known drivers such as Erich Bitter and Niki Lauda achieved numerous successes with the 180 hp Rüsselsheimer. Then the race car mysteriously disappeared. Now the Black Widow is back and Motorvision was there for the first rollout on the racetrack. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With the E-Tron S, Audi is expanding its fleet of electric drive vehicles and at the same time delivering a high-performance Sportback model. Also: the Brandlhof near Salzburg is one of the largest off-road parks in Europe. Toyota offers something very special there: a driving school where SUV and off-road vehicle drivers can sharpen their off-road skills away from the asphalt. And: the third generation of the Porsche Panamera. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Air Show in Montabaur - At this year's airfield festival, daring pilots gather in their rare aircraft to show what can be conjured up in the sky in unique air shows (channel information).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars from Asia are successful worldwide and there is an enormous variety. For example the Subaru BRZ. With 234 hp and incredible handling, it offers adrenaline rushes at a low price. The Mitsubishi Colt has been a bestseller since the 1980s. Now the seventh generation follows. How good is it compared to the competition? (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Would you like everyday vehicles with an extra portion of steam under the hood? The BMW 3 Series, Nissan 370 Z or Citroen DS3 are the norms of everyday life. But in the M version, Nismo or as a Musketeer, the performance is really good. Then sport is the order of the day. 431 hp give the Bavarian its legs. Japan's Nismo-370 produces 344 hp and the Citroen Musketeer DS3 Tiburon brings 222 French horses to the start. A happy round of fast 3 Series models for more driving fun on our roads. The story of the Three Musketeers is slightly rewritten here and told in a completely different way. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed ​​Stories, presenter Martin Utberg welcomes the managing director of the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk, Sven Bössow, in his home town of Seefeld in Tyrol. He questions him in detail about the dream work and about Sven's career. Martin also drives some special Porsche models in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Almost every car manufacturer also has an in-house tuner. Most of the models that are revised there are equipped with more cables and have a sportier appearance. For many customers, however, that is still not enough: individuality is the key. These customers are the target group of the endless number of smaller tuners who add one more thing to the manufacturers' top models. For example Performmaster from Baden-Württemberg. Their version of the C63 AMG S has 612 instead of 510 hp and 840 Nm maximum torque instead of 700. Supercars is testing this beast and other refined cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: The documentary series offers a unique insight into modern British policing. Camera teams follow police officers as they try to maintain order on England's streets. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: But electric cars are not conquering the world everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update. We test both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: All-wheel drive fun on and off-road
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: The Subaru Forester is taking off in its new sixth generation. We check its qualities on and off-road and find out the secret of its success. And this all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five exciting facts and a bonus about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N. (channel information) await you.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time. Classic car dealer Michael Schnabl, founder of Motorlegenden, makes car dreams come true. His specialty: rare and incredibly expensive Porsche models. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Also: Hyundai is taking a different approach with the Nexo and is devoting itself to fuel cell technology. And: the Volkswagen Golf GTE and two other VW hybrid models in comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Opel record racing car, called the 'Black Widow'. Built as an unofficial secret project, the limousine converted from an honest man to an arsonist caused a sensation on the race track in the late 1960s. Well-known drivers such as Erich Bitter and Niki Lauda achieved numerous successes with the 180 hp Rüsselsheimer. Then the race car mysteriously disappeared. Now the Black Widow is back and Motorvision was there for the first rollout on the racetrack. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With the E-Tron S, Audi is expanding its fleet of electric drive vehicles and at the same time delivering a high-performance Sportback model. Also: the Brandlhof near Salzburg is one of the largest off-road parks in Europe. Toyota offers something very special there: a driving school where SUV and off-road vehicle drivers can sharpen their off-road skills away from the asphalt. And: the third generation of the Porsche Panamera. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Air Show in Montabaur - At this year's airfield festival, daring pilots gather in their rare aircraft to show what can be conjured up in the sky in unique air shows (channel information).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars from Asia are successful worldwide and there is an enormous variety. For example the Subaru BRZ. With 234 hp and incredible handling, it offers adrenaline rushes at a low price. The Mitsubishi Colt has been a bestseller since the 1980s. Now the seventh generation follows. How good is it compared to the competition? (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Fresh air driving fun on two and three wheels
programme.desc: Two or three wheels? No matter. What counts is the fun in the open air. And there are new models on the market for this. Like the CFMOTO 700 CL-X Heritage. Has China struck the perfect balance between price and quality with this motorcycle? Why always two-wheelers? The Can-Am Ryker offers adrenaline-pumping driving fun without the need for a motorcycle license. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by the industrial park at the Nürburgring. Headquarters of Phoenix Racing GmbH. From here, the team of Swabia-born Ernst Moser shakes up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The new Bentley Continental GT. It is the successful model of the English luxury brand. Nevertheless, the British have been making losses in recent years. The new car must be a success in order to return Bentley to its former strength. This makes the development of the new Continental a particularly large, mammoth task. Made in England shows the development of the new GT and whether the luxury athlete also convinces racing legend Derek Bell. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome. But the war intervened... (channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: After more than 70 years, Land Rover presents a new edition of the classic Defender off-road vehicle. Also: the world record attempt in drifting in the Porsche Taycan at the Hockenheimring. And: the Porsche 911 Turbo and the 718 Spyder in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The 60s and 70s – the golden years for Opel. The traditional brand is at its best. Ascona, Manta, Rekord and GT: Opel is more than just a car, Opel is an attitude to life. Opel is colorful, fashionable, exciting - and builds one classic after another. Today they are all cult. Car History shows the heyday of Opel. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: And only here does the largest motorsport spectacle in the world take place. 210 racing cars, more than 1,000 drivers and helpers, plus over 200,000 fans. The 24 hour race leaves no one indifferent. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: What is the correct name? The boat, the boat or the boat? Well, today it's the Boot for once, because we're making a little trip to Düsseldorf with Motorvision on Tour and that's where the Boot is taking place and that's the world's largest yacht and water sports trade fair in the entire world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Size matters! At least many families will agree. With the BMW XM, M GmbH is presenting itself with a true colossus for families with certain demands for its 50th birthday. The fully electric KIA EV9 is significantly quieter, but visually similarly brutal. In the family check we find out whether it is perhaps the best electric car for large families. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Mercedes house tuner AMG is once again starting a star war. At least when it comes to horsepower. The C 63 AMG, E 63 S AMG and the S 63 AMG outperform each other in terms of performance data. AMG actually stands for Aufrecht, Melcher and Großsasbach, i.e. the names of the founders and the place where they were founded, but AMG could also stand for absolute motor enjoyment. Because the AMG stars all offer that. Large-volume, bassy, ​​rumbling high-performance drives. You can still tell today that the vehicles have their origins in motorsport. And this success story continues to be written today. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: On the Stunt Heroes highway, a skidding truck competes against a remote-controlled Chrysler. Stunt coordinator Domanski's goal: to take off the roof of the Chrysler. If everything goes according to plan, the stunt will result in a new convertible! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In Seefeld in Tyrol, the Swiss Spirit magazine welcomes a group of readers to the Spirit Driving Days. The participants set off with a young or vintage car and experience a route that is around 230 kilometers long, the highlight of which is the unique Engalm - a natural jewel with over 2,000 maple trees that are on average 500 years old. The teams are accommodated in the majestic and romantic, 500-year-old five-star monastery hotel Klosterbräu. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Below zero temperatures, lots of snow and cold hands. But that doesn't mean that driving fun is neglected. With the right driving machines, that's no problem: the 550 hp all-wheel drive monster Nissan GT-R has to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with a turbo engine finds its limit in Finnish Lapland. Hot boxes on the rocks – in supercars. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Runabout & Freestyle, Old Doha Port

programme.title: New Zealand Jetsprint Championship
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: The American West in the mid-1800's – a land beyond the reach of the law. A ruthless gang plunders the plains, murdering innocent Indian women and children to collect their scalps. One man stands in their way, a warrior hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.desc: While healing from an injury, a figure-skater meets a man who shows her there is more to life than competing.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: A single mother invites her ex over for Christmas on one condition: he must reconcile with their daughters.

programme.title: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A surprise awaits a single mother when she becomes engaged to the son of Santa Claus.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Inspiring Love

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programme.desc: As Perry Smith and Richard Hickock face a death sentence, Truman Capote's coverage of the infamous case and his ensuing novel, "In Cold Blood," spawns the modern American True Crime genre.

programme.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: The global hunt for 'The Chameleon Killer,' Elaine Parent, wanted for the 1990 murder of 34-year-old Beverly McGowan; when a body is discovered in a Florida canal, law enforcement pieces together a timeline of the victim's final days.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads to the wrong woman being summoned to court; law enforcement begins to piece together the backstory of the Chameleon Killer and uncover a string of stolen identities.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: When the police follow up on a tip-off, the Chameleon Killer manages to slip through their grasp; it isn't long before another tip-off leads the police right to her doorstep.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.sub-title: Chapter One: A Head Weighs Less Than a Body
programme.desc: Far off in the West, bounty hunter Red Bill searches for the man who slew his mother; in nearby Greenvale, where it hasn't rained for years, local farmer Steve finds gold beneath his land; Sheriff McCoy comes upon a small fortune.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: After Red Bill is captured, old memories come back to haunt him; McCoy comes upon Butler's farm; Steve and Eve's relationship woes intensify.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill travels the barren wastes with McCoy and Kurt; in Greenvale, Eve's struggle to maintain her business is threatened; Thompson's claim to Steve's land is taken up a notch.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Fifteen years earlier, Red Bill learns about being a man from a rugged Civil War veteran, Anderson; McCoy and his vile older brother, Bronson, must resort to increasingly dark means as they struggle to survive the desert.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill, McCoy and Kurt enter the mines, where trouble ensues; Eve faces dire consequences for her actions; a modern-day Bronson runs for governor.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Rain comes to Greenvale, bringing with it great struggle; Bronson's men encounter McCoy and Red Bill; unexpected reunions abound.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: In the wake of the shoot-offs with Bronson's men, Red Bill and McCoy must come together for a common goal; Thompson's pressure on Steve reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: That Dirty Black Bag
programme.desc: Red Bill and McCoy's quest for Bronson comes to a breaking point, as impossible decisions and realizations are made; Bronson takes a new step toward power; Steve faces Thompson in a final standoff.
